channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Telehealth Providers Offer Misoprostol-Only Abortions Amid Mifepristone Restrictions
item.description: Following a U.S. federal appeals court decision reinstating an in-person requirement for mifepristone, a key medication used in abortion care, telehealth providers swiftly adapted by offering misopros...

item.title: Jewish Australians share experiences of antisemitism at royal commission
item.description: The Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion has heard firsthand accounts from Jewish Australians detailing the rising incidents of antisemitism in the country. Witnesses described how pub...

item.title: BJP wins West Bengal and keeps Assam; TVK emerges largest in Tamil Nadu, Congress-led alliance takes Kerala
item.description: Assembly election counting brought major political changes across five regions. In West Bengal, the BJP ended the Trinamool Congress’s 15-year rule by winning a clear majority, while Mamata Banerjee l...

item.title: Pirates close gap on Sundowns after crucial win over Stellenbosch
item.description: Orlando Pirates kept their Betway Premiership title challenge firmly on track with a solid 2-0 win over Stellenbosch FC at a lively Athlone Stadium in Cape Town. Evidence Makgopa and Patrick Maswangan...

item.title: Payne Haas sidelined after knee injury in Broncos vs Tigers match
item.description: During the NRL clash between the Brisbane Broncos and Wests Tigers, star forward Payne Haas was forced to leave the field late in the first half due to a suspected knee injury. The incident occurred a...

item.title: MMWWA Condemns Xenophobic Violence and Urges African Unity in South Africa
item.description: The Millennium Muslim Women of West Africa (MMWWA) has strongly condemned the recent xenophobic attacks targeting African nationals residing and working in South Africa. In a statement issued by Natio...

item.title: Madonna directs assistant during Met Gala in themed outfit inspired by Surrealist painting
item.description: At the Met Gala 2026, Madonna, aged 67, drew attention for her dramatic appearance and interactions on the red carpet. The pop icon wore a gothic-inspired Saint Laurent lace gown, complemented by sati...

item.title: Parliamentary Budget Officer Critiques Government’s Economic Projections and Fiscal Plans
item.description: Annette Ryan, the newly appointed Parliamentary Budget Officer (PBO), has delivered a thorough critique of the federal government’s spring economic update, highlighting several shortcomings in the Lib...

item.title: APC Leaders Insist On Transparent Primaries Ahead Of 2027 Elections
item.description: For the 2027 general elections, some top people for APC don dey talk say dem no go gree make anybody impose as candidate. The big men wey dey involved na Abdulrazak Namdas from Adamawa, Sani Shinkafi ...

item.title: Astronomers discover a small icy object beyond Neptune with an atmosphere
item.description: Astronomers have identified a small, icy celestial body located beyond Neptune, which has been informally dubbed a 'mini-Pluto'. This discovery is significant because it adds to our understanding of t...

item.title: Long-term health risks from asbestos exposure still affecting former South African miners
item.description: New research from the University of Cape Town highlights the lasting health impact of asbestos exposure on former South African miners, decades after the industry was banned in 2008. The study analyse...

item.title: Inquiry finds mental health services lost contact with Nottingham killer before discharge
item.description: An official inquiry has revealed that mental health services discharged Valdo Calocane, who later committed murder in Nottingham, because they were unable to locate him. The revelation raises serious ...

item.title: Donald Trump Declares Himself Extremely Powerful Amid Critics’ Skepticism
item.description: On May 3, 2026, Donald Trump publicly declared himself 'the most powerful person to ever live,' a statement that quickly drew both amusement and criticism. Delivered with characteristic confidence, th...

item.title: Louise Arbour Appointed as Canada's Next Governor General
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has officially announced that retired Supreme Court justice Louise Arbour will serve as Canada's next governor general. Arbour, who has had a distinguished legal and public ...

item.title: Former Collingwood Officer Charged with Second-Degree Murder in North York Shooting
item.description: A 67-year-old former police officer from Collingwood and ex-York University executive, Michaelo Markicevic, has been charged with second-degree murder in connection with a fatal shooting in North York...

item.title: Family Appeals for Support to Repatriate Kenyan Worker Who Died in Dubai
item.description: The family of Onesmus Karanja Muniu, popularly known as Onesse or “Onesse Tano Nane”, is mourning his untimely death in Dubai where he had gone in search of better job opportunities. Onesmus passed aw...

item.title: Court hears evidence in trial of teacher accused of murdering adopted infant
item.description: The ongoing trial at Preston Crown Court concerns the death of 13-month-old Preston Davey, who died in July 2023. Jamie Varley, a 37-year-old former secondary school teacher, and his partner John McGo...

item.title: TVK Chief Vijay Seeks to Form Tamil Nadu Government with Conditional Congress Support
item.description: In the recent Tamil Nadu assembly elections, TVK president C Joseph Vijay has emerged as the single largest party with 108 seats in the 234-member assembly, falling around 10 seats short of the majori...

item.title: Orlando Pirates beat Stellenbosch FC to stay close to Mamelodi Sundowns in PSL title race
item.description: Orlando Pirates secured a vital 2-0 victory over Stellenbosch FC at Athlone Stadium on Tuesday night, keeping the pressure on PSL leaders Mamelodi Sundowns. Quick-fire goals from Evidence Makgopa in t...

item.title: Critique of the Met Gala Highlights Wealth and Social Disconnect
item.description: The recent Met Gala drew attention not only for its extravagant fashion but also for the stark contrast between the glamour on display and the world’s pressing social issues. Canadian actor Sarah Paul...
